questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在大量 Amazon EC2 執行個體上執行應用程式。該應用程式讀取 Amazon DynamoDB 表中的條目並將其寫入其中。 DynamoDB 表的大小不斷增長，但應用程式只需要最近 30 天的資料。該公司需要一種能夠最大限度地減少成本和開發工作的解決方案。哪種解決方案滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company runs an application on a large fleet of Amazon EC2 instances. The application reads and writes entries into an Amazon DynamoDB table. The size of the DynamoDB table continuously grows, but the application needs only data from the last 30 days. The company needs a solution that minimizes cost and development effort. Which solution meets these requirements?

A.zh: 使用 AWS CloudFormation 範本部署完整的解決方案。每 30 天重新部署一次 CloudFormation 堆疊，並刪除原始堆疊。
A.en: Use an AWS CloudFormation template to deploy the complete solution. Redeploy the CloudFormation stack every 30 days, and delete the original stack.

B.zh: 使用執行來自 AWS Marketplace 的監控應用程式的 EC2 執行個體。設定監控應用程式以使用 Amazon DynamoDB Streams 來儲存在表格中建立新專案時的時間戳記。使用在 EC2 執行個體上執行的腳本來刪除時間戳早於 30 天的項目。
B.en: Use an EC2 instance that runs a monitoring application from AWS Marketplace. Configure the monitoring application to use Amazon DynamoDB Streams to store the timestamp when a new item is created in the table. Use a script that runs on the EC2 instance to delete items that have a timestamp that is older than 30 days.

C.zh: 設定 Amazon DynamoDB Streams 以在表格中建立新專案時呼叫 AWS Lambda 函數。配置 Lambda 函數以刪除表中超過 30 天的項目。
C.en: Configure Amazon DynamoDB Streams to invoke an AWS Lambda function when a new item is created in the table. Configure the Lambda function to delete items in the table that are older than 30 days.

D.zh: 擴展應用程序，向表中創建的每個新項目添加一個屬性，該屬性的值是當前時間戳加上 30 天。配置 DynamoDB 以使用該屬性作為 TTL 屬性。
D.en: Extend the application to add an attribute that has a value of the current timestamp plus 30 days to each new item that is created in the table. Configure DynamoDB to use the attribute as the TTL attribute.

A.zh: 錯誤。CloudFormation主要用於資源的自動化部署和管理，而非資料管理。重新部署整個堆棧，刪除原來的堆棧，效率低下，不符合「最小化開發工作量」的要求。
A.en: Incorrect. CloudFormation is mainly used for automated deployment and management of resources, not data management. Redeploying the entire stack and deleting the original stack is inefficient and does not meet the requirements of "minimizing development effort.".

B.zh: 錯誤。此方法需要額外的 EC2 執行個體和監控應用程序，從而增加了成本和複雜性。手動運行腳本也增加了開發工作量，不符合「成本和開發工作量最小化」的要求。
B.en: Incorrect. This approach requires additional EC2 instances and monitoring applications, adding cost and complexity. Manually running scripts also increases the development workload and does not meet the requirement of "minimizing costs and development workload".

C.zh: 錯誤。儘管可以使用 Lambda 函數自動執行刪除操作，但需要額外的開發工作來編寫和維護 Lambda 函數邏輯。與選項D相比，開發工作量更大。
C.en: Incorrect. Although deletion operations can be automated using Lambda functions, additional development effort is required to write and maintain Lambda function logic. Compared with option D, the development workload is greater.

D.zh: 正確。DynamoDB 的 TTL 功能會自動刪除過期數據，無需額外的開發工作或資源。透過設定 TTL 屬性，DynamoDB 將自動清理超過 30 天的數據，滿足「最小化成本和開發工作量」的要求。
D.en: Correct. DynamoDB's TTL feature automatically deletes expired data without requiring additional development work or resources. By setting the TTL attribute, DynamoDB will automatically clean data older than 30 days, meeting the requirement of "minimizing costs and development effort.".

answer_text.zh: D. 擴展應用程序，向表中創建的每個新項目添加一個屬性，該屬性的值是當前時間戳加上 30 天。配置 DynamoDB 以使用該屬性作為 TTL 屬性。
answer_text.en: D. Extend the application to add an attribute that has a value of the current timestamp plus 30 days to each new item that is created in the table. Configure DynamoDB to use the attribute as the TTL attribute.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (95%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：DynamoDB 的 TTL 功能會自動刪除過期數據，無需額外的開發工作或資源。透過設定 TTL 屬性，DynamoDB 將自動清理超過 30 天的數據，滿足「最小化成本和開發工作量」的要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (95%). Popular discussion and key point summary: DynamoDB's TTL feature automatically deletes expired data without requiring additional development work or resources. By setting the TTL attribute, DynamoDB will automatically clean data older than 30 days, meeting the requirement of "minimizing costs and development effort.".

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司有一個在本機 Windows Server 上執行的 Microsoft .NET 應用程式。該應用程式使用 Oracle 資料庫標準版伺服器儲存資料。該公司正在計劃遷移到 AWS，並希望在遷移應用程式時最大程度地減少開發變更。 AWS應用程式環境應該是高可用的。公司應該採取哪些行動組合來滿足這些要求？ （選兩個。）
question_text.en: A company has a Microsoft .NET application that runs on an on-premises Windows Server. The application stores data by using an Oracle Database Standard Edition server. The company is planning a migration to AWS and wants to minimize development changes while moving the application. The AWS application environment should be highly available. Which combination of actions should the company take to meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 使用執行 .NET Core 的 AWS Lambda 函數將應用程式重構為無伺服器。
A.en: Refactor the application as serverless with AWS Lambda functions running .NET Core.

B.zh: 在多可用區部署中使用 .NET 平臺重新託管 AWS Elastic Beanstalk 中的應用程式。
B.en: Rehost the application in AWS Elastic Beanstalk with the .NET platform in a Multi-AZ deployment.

C.zh: 重新建置應用程式平臺，以便使用 Amazon Linux Amazon 系統映像 (AMI) 在 Amazon EC2 上運作。
C.en: Replatform the application to run on Amazon EC2 with the Amazon Linux Amazon Machine Image (AMI).

D.zh: 使用 AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) 在多可用區部署中從 Oracle 資料庫移轉到 Amazon DynamoDB。
D.en: Use AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) to migrate from the Oracle database to Amazon DynamoDB in a Multi-AZ deployment.

E.zh: 使用 AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) 在多可用區部署中從 Oracle 資料庫遷移到 Amazon RDS 上的 Oracle。
E.en: Use AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) to migrate from the Oracle database to Oracle on Amazon RDS in a Multi- AZ deployment.

A.zh: 錯誤。將應用程式重構為無伺服器架構需要大量的開發工作，這與問題所要求的「最小化開發變更」不一致。
A.en: Incorrect. Refactoring the application to a serverless architecture requires a lot of development work, which is inconsistent with the "minimized development changes" required by the question.

B.zh: 正確。AWS Elastic Beanstalk 支援.NET 平臺快速遷移應用程序，並支援多可用區部署以實現高可用性。
B.en: Correct. AWS Elastic Beanstalk supports the .NET platform to quickly migrate applications and supports multi-AZ deployment for high availability.

C.zh: 錯誤。問題提到應用程式在 Windows Server 上執行，但 Amazon Linux AMI 不支援 Windows 環境。遷移到 Linux 需要大量的開發工作。
C.en: Incorrect. The question mentions that the application runs on Windows Server, but the Amazon Linux AMI does not support the Windows environment. Migrating to Linux requires a lot of development work.

D.zh: 錯誤。DynamoDB 是一種 NoSQL 資料庫，與現有的 Oracle 資料庫（關聯式資料庫）架構不相容。遷移到 DynamoDB 需要對應用程式進行大量修改。
D.en: Incorrect. DynamoDB is a NoSQL database and is incompatible with the existing Oracle database (relational database) architecture. Migrating to DynamoDB requires extensive modifications to the application.

E.zh: 正確。Amazon RDS 支援 Oracle 資料庫，可使用 AWS DMS 進行遷移，並支援多可用區部署以實現高可用性。
E.en: Correct. Amazon RDS supports Oracle databases, can be migrated using AWS DMS, and supports multi-AZ deployment for high availability.

answer_text.zh: B. 在多可用區部署中使用 .NET 平臺重新託管 AWS Elastic Beanstalk 中的應用程式。；E. 使用 AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) 在多可用區部署中從 Oracle 資料庫遷移到 Amazon RDS 上的 Oracle。
answer_text.en: B. Rehost the application in AWS Elastic Beanstalk with the .NET platform in a Multi-AZ deployment.; E. Use AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) to migrate from the Oracle database to Oracle on Amazon RDS in a Multi- AZ deployment.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：BE (97%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：AWS Elastic Beanstalk 支援.NET 平臺快速遷移應用程序，並支援多可用區部署以實現高可用性。；Amazon RDS 支援 Oracle 資料庫，可使用 AWS DMS 進行遷移，並支援多可用區部署以實現高可用性。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: BE (97%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS Elastic Beanstalk supports the .NET platform to quickly migrate applications and supports multi-AZ deployment for high availability.; Amazon RDS supports Oracle databases, can be migrated using AWS DMS, and supports multi-AZ deployment for high availability.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在本地資料中心的 Kubernetes 叢集上運行容器化應用程式。該公司正在使用 MongoDB 資料庫進行資料儲存。該公司希望將其中一些環境遷移到 AWS，但目前無法更改程式碼或部署方法。該公司需要一種能夠最大限度地減少營運開銷的解決方案。哪種解決方案滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company runs a containerized application on a Kubernetes cluster in an on-premises data center. The company is using a MongoDB database for data storage. The company wants to migrate some of these environments to AWS, but no code changes or deployment method changes are possible at this time. The company needs a solution that minimizes operational overhead. Which solution meets these requirements?

A.zh: 將 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 與 Amazon EC2 工作執行緒節點結合使用進行運算，並使用 EC2 上的 MongoDB 進行資料儲存。
A.en: Use Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) with Amazon EC2 worker nodes for compute and MongoDB on EC2 for data storage.

B.zh: 將 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 與 AWS Fargate 結合使用進行運算，並使用 Amazon DynamoDB 進行資料存儲
B.en: Use Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) with AWS Fargate for compute and Amazon DynamoDB for data storage

C.zh: 將 Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) 與 Amazon EC2 工作執行緒節點結合使用進行運算，並使用 Amazon DynamoDB 進行資料儲存。
C.en: Use Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) with Amazon EC2 worker nodes for compute and Amazon DynamoDB for data storage.

D.zh: 將 Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) 與 AWS Fargate 結合使用進行運算，並使用 Amazon DocumentDB（與 MongoDB 相容）進行資料儲存。
D.en: Use Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) with AWS Fargate for compute and Amazon DocumentDB (with MongoDB compatibility) for data storage.

A.zh: 錯誤。本質分析：Amazon ECS可以運行容器化應用程序，但使用EC2實例運行MongoDB會增加管理開銷（如手動安裝、維護、備份等）。原因 不符合「最小化操作開銷」的要求。
A.en: Incorrect. ness analysis: Amazon ECS can run containerized applications, but using EC2 instances to run MongoDB will increase management overhead (such as manual installation, maintenance, backup, etc.). Reason for the The requirement of "minimizing operation overhead" is not met.

B.zh: 錯誤。本質分析：AWS Fargate減少了管理運算資源的開銷，但DynamoDB是NoSQL資料庫，與MongoDB的相容性較低。修改程式碼的原因是需要適配DynamoDB，不符合「不改變程式碼或部署方式」的要求。
B.en: Incorrect. ness analysis: AWS Fargate reduces the overhead of managing computing resources, but DynamoDB is a NoSQL database and has low compatibility with MongoDB. Reason for the Code modification is required to adapt to DynamoDB, which does not meet the requirement of "no code or deployment method changes".

C.zh: 錯誤。本質分析：Amazon EKS 支援 Kubernetes，但 DynamoDB 與 MongoDB 不相容，EC2 工作節點增加了管理開銷。原因 不符合「不更改程式碼」和「最小化操作開銷」的要求。
C.en: Incorrect. ness analysis: Amazon EKS supports Kubernetes, but DynamoDB is not compatible with MongoDB, and EC2 worker nodes increase management overhead. Reason for the The requirements of "no code changes" and "minimizing operational overhead" are not met.

D.zh: 正確。本質分析：Amazon EKS 支援 Kubernetes、AWS Fargate 減少運算資源管理開銷、Amazon DocumentDB 相容 MongoDB，並且符合「無程式碼變更」的要求。原因它完全滿足問題要求，最大限度地減少操作開銷，並且不需要更改程式碼或部署方法。
D.en: Correct. ness analysis: Amazon EKS supports Kubernetes, AWS Fargate reduces computing resource management overhead, Amazon DocumentDB is compatible with MongoDB, and meets the requirement of "no code changes". Reason why it is It fully meets the question requirements, minimizes operational overhead and requires no code or deployment method changes.

answer_text.zh: D. 將 Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) 與 AWS Fargate 結合使用進行運算，並使用 Amazon DocumentDB（與 MongoDB 相容）進行資料儲存。
answer_text.en: D. Use Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) with AWS Fargate for compute and Amazon DocumentDB (with MongoDB compatibility) for data storage.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：本質分析：Amazon EKS 支援 Kubernetes、AWS Fargate 減少運算資源管理開銷、Amazon DocumentDB 相容 MongoDB，並且符合「無程式碼變更」的要求。原因它完全滿足問題要求，最大限度地減少操作開銷，並且不需要更改程式碼或部署方法。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: ness analysis: Amazon EKS supports Kubernetes, AWS Fargate reduces computing resource management overhead, Amazon DocumentDB is compatible with MongoDB, and meets the requirement of "no code changes". Reason why it is It fully meets the question requirements, minimizes operational overhead and requires no code or deployment method changes.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家電話行銷公司正在 AWS 上設計其客戶呼叫中心功能。該公司需要一種能夠提供多個說話者識別並產生轉錄檔案的解決方案。該公司想要查詢記錄文件以分析業務模式。成績單文件必須保存 7 年以供審計之用。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A telemarketing company is designing its customer call center functionality on AWS. The company needs a solution that provides multiple speaker recognition and generates transcript files. The company wants to query the transcript files to analyze the business patterns. The transcript files must be stored for 7 years for auditing purposes. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 使用 Amazon Rekognition 進行多說話人辨識。將轉錄檔案儲存在 Amazon S3 中。使用機器學習模型進行轉錄檔案分析。
A.en: Use Amazon Rekognition for multiple speaker recognition. Store the transcript files in Amazon S3. Use machine learning models for transcript file analysis.

B.zh: 使用 Amazon Transcribe 進行多說話人辨識。使用 Amazon Athena 進行轉錄檔案分析。
B.en: Use Amazon Transcribe for multiple speaker recognition. Use Amazon Athena for transcript file analysis.

C.zh: 使用 Amazon Translate 進行多說話人辨識。將轉錄檔案儲存在 Amazon Redshift 中。使用 SQL 查詢進行轉錄檔案分析。
C.en: Use Amazon Translate for multiple speaker recognition. Store the transcript files in Amazon Redshift. Use SQL queries for transcript file analysis.

D.zh: 使用 Amazon Rekognition 進行多說話人辨識。將轉錄檔案儲存在 Amazon S3 中。使用 Amazon Textract 進行轉錄檔案分析。
D.en: Use Amazon Rekognition for multiple speaker recognition. Store the transcript files in Amazon S3. Use Amazon Textract for transcript file analysis.

A.zh: 錯誤。Amazon S3 可以儲存腳本檔案以滿足長期儲存需求。此題並未明確要求使用機器學習模型進行分析，也沒有提及具體的分析工具。
A.en: Incorrect. Amazon S3 can store transcript files for long-term storage needs. The question does not clearly require the use of machine learning models for analysis, and no specific analysis tools are mentioned.

B.zh: 正確。Amazon Athena 可以對 Amazon S3 中儲存的腳本檔案執行 SQL 查詢分析。 Amazon S3 可滿足您 7 年的長期儲存需求。
B.en: Correct. Amazon Athena can perform SQL query analysis on transcript files stored in Amazon S3. Amazon S3 can meet your long-term storage needs for 7 years.

C.zh: 錯誤。Amazon Redshift 是一項資料倉儲服務。雖然它支援SQL查詢，但它不適合長期儲存轉錄檔案。
C.en: Incorrect. Amazon Redshift is a data warehouse service. Although it supports SQL queries, it is not suitable for storing transcription files for long-term storage.

D.zh: 錯誤。Amazon S3 可以儲存腳本檔案以滿足長期儲存需求。 Amazon Textract 用於從文件中提取文字訊息，不適合分析轉錄檔案。
D.en: Incorrect. Amazon S3 can store transcript files for long-term storage needs. Amazon Textract is used to extract text information from documents and is not suitable for analyzing transcribed files.

answer_text.zh: B. 使用 Amazon Transcribe 進行多說話人辨識。使用 Amazon Athena 進行轉錄檔案分析。
answer_text.en: B. Use Amazon Transcribe for multiple speaker recognition. Use Amazon Athena for transcript file analysis.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (93%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：Amazon Athena 可以對 Amazon S3 中儲存的腳本檔案執行 SQL 查詢分析。 Amazon S3 可滿足您 7 年的長期儲存需求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (93%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon Athena can perform SQL query analysis on transcript files stored in Amazon S3. Amazon S3 can meet your long-term storage needs for 7 years.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在 AWS 上託管其應用程式。該公司使用 Amazon Cognito 來管理用戶。當使用者登入應用程式時，應用程式使用 Amazon API Gateway 中託管的 REST API 從 Amazon DynamoDB 取得所需資料。該公司需要一個 AWS 託管解決方案來控制對 REST API 的訪問，以減少開發工作。哪種解決方案能夠以最少的營運開銷滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company hosts its application on AWS. The company uses Amazon Cognito to manage users. When users log in to the application, the application fetches required data from Amazon DynamoDB by using a REST API that is hosted in Amazon API Gateway. The company wants an AWS managed solution that will control access to the REST API to reduce development efforts. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

A.zh: 將 AWS Lambda 函數設定為 API Gateway 中的授權者，以驗證哪個使用者發出了請求。
A.en: Configure an AWS Lambda function to be an authorizer in API Gateway to validate which user made the request.

B.zh: 為每個使用者建立並指派一個必須隨每個請求發送的 API 金鑰。使用 AWS Lambda 函數驗證金鑰。
B.en: For each user, create and assign an API key that must be sent with each request. Validate the key by using an AWS Lambda function.

C.zh: 在每個請求的標頭中發送使用者的電子郵件地址。呼叫 AWS Lambda 函數來驗證具有該電子郵件地址的使用者是否具有正確的存取權限。
C.en: Send the user’s email address in the header with every request. Invoke an AWS Lambda function to validate that the user with that email address has proper access.

D.zh: 在 API Gateway 中設定 Amazon Cognito 使用者池授權方，以允許 Amazon Cognito 驗證每個要求。
D.en: Configure an Amazon Cognito user pool authorizer in API Gateway to allow Amazon Cognito to validate each request.

A.zh: 錯誤。分析：Lambda授權方雖然可以實現使用者認證，但需要自訂程式碼的開發和維護，增加了維運工作量。這不符合「減少開發工作量」和「最小化維運開銷」的要求問題。因此這個選項是錯誤的。
A.en: Incorrect. Analysis: Although the Lambda authorizer can implement user authentication, it requires the development and maintenance of custom code, which increases the operation and maintenance workload. This does not meet the "reduce development effort" and "minimize operation and maintenance overhead" requirements of the question. Therefore this option is wrong.

B.zh: 錯誤。分析：API金鑰的管理和分發需要額外的開發工作，且API金鑰本身不提供使用者認證功能。還需要額外的Lambda函數來驗證金鑰，增加了運維的複雜度。因此這個選項是錯誤的。
B.en: Incorrect. Analysis: The management and distribution of API keys requires additional development work, and API keys themselves do not provide user authentication functionality. Additional Lambda functions are also needed to verify the key, which increases the complexity of operation and maintenance. Therefore this option is wrong.

C.zh: 錯誤。存取權限。分析：這種方式需要開發和維護自訂的Lambda函數來驗證使用者權限，直接傳送使用者的電子郵件地址可能會帶來安全風險。這不符合「減少開發工作量」和「最小化維運開銷」的要求問題。因此這個選項是錯誤的。
C.en: Incorrect. Access rights. Analysis: This approach requires developing and maintaining a custom Lambda function to verify user permissions, and sending the user's email address directly may pose security risks. This does not meet the "reduce development effort" and "minimize operation and maintenance overhead" requirements of the question. Therefore this option is wrong.

D.zh: 正確。分析：Amazon Cognito 使用者池授權器是 AWS 託管解決方案，可直接與 API Gateway 整合以自動處理使用者驗證和授權。此方法減少了開發工作量和維運開銷，完全滿足問題的要求。因此這個選項是。
D.en: Correct. Analysis: Amazon Cognito User Pool Authorizer is an AWS managed solution that can be integrated directly with API Gateway to automatically handle user authentication and authorization. This method reduces development workload and operation and maintenance overhead, and fully meets the requirements of the question. Therefore this option is.

answer_text.zh: D. 在 API Gateway 中設定 Amazon Cognito 使用者池授權方，以允許 Amazon Cognito 驗證每個要求。
answer_text.en: D. Configure an Amazon Cognito user pool authorizer in API Gateway to allow Amazon Cognito to validate each request.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (98%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：分析：Amazon Cognito 使用者池授權器是 AWS 託管解決方案，可直接與 API Gateway 整合以自動處理使用者驗證和授權。此方法減少了開發工作量和維運開銷，完全滿足問題的要求。因此這個選項是。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (98%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Analysis: Amazon Cognito User Pool Authorizer is an AWS managed solution that can be integrated directly with API Gateway to automatically handle user authentication and authorization. This method reduces development workload and operation and maintenance overhead, and fully meets the requirements of the question. Therefore this option is.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在開發針對行動應用程式用戶的行銷傳播服務。該公司需要透過簡訊服務 (SMS) 向用戶發送確認訊息。用戶必須能夠回覆簡訊。該公司必須將回覆保存一年以供分析。解決方案架構師應該怎麼做才能滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company is developing a marketing communications service that targets mobile app users. The company needs to send confirmation messages with Short Message Service (SMS) to its users. The users must be able to reply to the SMS messages. The company must store the responses for a year for analysis. What should a solutions architect do to meet these requirements?

A.zh: 建立 Amazon Connect 聯絡流以傳送 SMS 訊息。使用 AWS Lambda 處理回應。
A.en: Create an Amazon Connect contact flow to send the SMS messages. Use AWS Lambda to process the responses.

B.zh: 建構 Amazon Pinpoint 旅程。配置 Amazon Pinpoint 以將事件傳送至 Amazon Kinesis 資料流以進行分析和存檔。
B.en: Build an Amazon Pinpoint journey. Configure Amazon Pinpoint to send events to an Amazon Kinesis data stream for analysis and archiving.

C.zh: 使用 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) 散佈 SMS 訊息。使用 AWS Lambda 處理回應。
C.en: Use Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) to distribute the SMS messages. Use AWS Lambda to process the responses.

D.zh: 建立 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) FIFO 主題。將 Amazon Kinesis 資料流訂閱到 SNS 主題以進行分析和存檔。
D.en: Create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) FIFO topic. Subscribe an Amazon Kinesis data stream to the SNS topic for analysis and archiving.

A.zh: 錯誤。Amazon Connect 主要用於建置呼叫中心解決方案，而不是傳送 SMS 訊息。雖然可以使用 AWS Lambda 處理回應，但 Amazon Connect 不適合這種情況。原因 此選項無法滿足發送簡訊和儲存回覆的需求。
A.en: Incorrect. Amazon Connect is primarily intended for building call center solutions rather than sending SMS messages. While it is possible to use AWS Lambda to handle responses, Amazon Connect is not suitable for this scenario. Reason for This option does not meet the needs of sending SMS messages and storing replies.

B.zh: 正確。原因：此選項完全滿足發送簡訊、處理回覆和儲存資料的需求。
B.en: Correct. reason: This option fully meets the needs of sending SMS messages, processing replies, and storing data.

C.zh: 錯誤。回應。 Amazon SQS 主要用於訊息排隊，而不是直接發送 SMS 訊息。雖然可以使用 AWS Lambda 處理回復，但 SQS 不適合發送 SMS 訊息。原因 此選項不符合發送 SMS 訊息的要求。
C.en: Incorrect. responses. Amazon SQS is primarily used for message queuing rather than sending SMS messages directly. While it is possible to use AWS Lambda to handle replies, SQS is not suitable for sending SMS messages. Reason for the This option does not meet the requirements for sending SMS messages.

D.zh: 錯誤。SNS 主題進行分析與歸檔。 Amazon SNS 可以發送通知，但不支援使用者回覆 SMS 訊息。 FIFO主題主要用於嚴格的訊息排序，而不是SMS訊息發送。原因 此選項不支援用戶回覆簡訊的需要。
D.en: Incorrect. the SNS topic for analysis and archiving. Amazon SNS can send notifications, but does not support users replying to SMS messages. FIFO topics are mainly used for strict message ordering, not SMS message sending. Reason for This option does not support the user's need to reply to SMS messages.

answer_text.zh: B. 建構 Amazon Pinpoint 旅程。配置 Amazon Pinpoint 以將事件傳送至 Amazon Kinesis 資料流以進行分析和存檔。
answer_text.en: B. Build an Amazon Pinpoint journey. Configure Amazon Pinpoint to send events to an Amazon Kinesis data stream for analysis and archiving.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (90%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：原因：此選項完全滿足發送簡訊、處理回覆和儲存資料的需求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (90%). Popular discussion and key point summary: reason: This option fully meets the needs of sending SMS messages, processing replies, and storing data.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司計劃將其資料移至 Amazon S3 儲存桶。資料儲存在S3儲存桶中時必須進行加密。此外，加密金鑰必須每年自動輪換。哪種解決方案能夠以最少的營運開銷滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company is planning to move its data to an Amazon S3 bucket. The data must be encrypted when it is stored in the S3 bucket. Additionally, the encryption key must be automatically rotated every year. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

A.zh: 將資料移至 S3 儲存桶。使用 Amazon S3 託管加密金鑰 (SSE-S3) 的伺服器端加密。使用 SSE-S3 加密金鑰的內建金鑰輪換行為。
A.en: Move the data to the S3 bucket. Use server-side encryption with Amazon S3 managed encryption keys (SSE-S3). Use the built-in key rotation behavior of SSE-S3 encryption keys.

B.zh: 建立 AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) 客戶託管金鑰。啟用自動密鑰輪換。將 S3 儲存桶的預設加密行為設定為使用客戶管理的 KMS 金鑰。將資料移至 S3 儲存桶。
B.en: Create an AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) customer managed key. Enable automatic key rotation. Set the S3 bucket’s default encryption behavior to use the customer managed KMS key. Move the data to the S3 bucket.

C.zh: 建立 AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) 客戶託管金鑰。將 S3 儲存桶的預設加密行為設定為使用客戶管理的 KMS 金鑰。將資料移至 S3 儲存桶。每年手動輪換 KMS 密鑰。
C.en: Create an AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) customer managed key. Set the S3 bucket’s default encryption behavior to use the customer managed KMS key. Move the data to the S3 bucket. Manually rotate the KMS key every year.

D.zh: 在將資料移至 S3 儲存桶之前使用客戶金鑰材料加密資料。建立不含密鑰材料的 AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) 密鑰。將客戶密鑰材料匯入到 KMS 密鑰中。啟用自動密鑰輪換。
D.en: Encrypt the data with customer key material before moving the data to the S3 bucket. Create an AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) key without key material. Import the customer key material into the KMS key. Enable automatic key rotation.

A.zh: 正確。SSE-S3 加密金鑰的內建金鑰輪換行為。分析：SSE-S3 是 Amazon S3 的內建加密選項，它使用由 Amazon S3 管理的加密金鑰。 SSE-S3 自動管理金鑰建立和輪換，無需使用者乾預。此選項完全滿足題目要求，且運行開銷最低。結論：。
A.en: Correct. the built-in key rotation behavior of SSE-S3 encryption keys. Analysis: SSE-S3 is a built-in encryption option for Amazon S3 that uses encryption keys managed by Amazon S3. SSE-S3 automatically manages key creation and rotation without user intervention. This option fully meets the question requirements and has the lowest operating overhead. Conclusion:.

B.zh: 錯誤。儲存桶的預設加密行為使用客戶管理的 KMS 金鑰。將資料移至 S3 儲存桶。分析：使用 AWS KMS 客戶託管金鑰可以實現加密和自動金鑰輪換。雖然滿足了問題要求，但需要額外配置和管理KMS金鑰，增加了操作開銷。結論：錯誤。
B.en: Incorrect. bucket’s default encryption behavior to use the customer managed KMS key. Move the data to the S3 bucket. Analysis: Encryption and automatic key rotation can be achieved using AWS KMS customer managed key. Although it meets the question requirements, it requires additional configuration and management of KMS keys, which increases operational overhead. Conclusion: Wrong.

C.zh: 錯誤。使用客戶管理的 KMS 金鑰的行為。將資料移至 S3 儲存桶。每年手動輪換 KMS 密鑰。分析：手動輪換KMS金鑰會增加操作開銷，且不符合問題的「自動輪調」要求。此選項不滿足問題所需的最低營運開銷。結論：錯誤。
C.en: Incorrect. behavior to use the customer managed KMS key. Move the data to the S3 bucket. Manually rotate the KMS key every year. Analysis: Manually rotating the KMS key increases operational overhead and does not meet the "automatic rotation" requirement of the question. This option does not meet the minimum operational overhead required by the question. Conclusion: Wrong.

D.zh: 錯誤。沒有密鑰材料的服務 (AWS KMS) 密鑰。將客戶密鑰材料匯入到 KMS 密鑰中。啟用自動密鑰輪換。分析：此選項要求使用者在遷移資料之前手動加密資料並將客戶金鑰資料匯入KMS。操作複雜，不滿足問題要求的「最小操作開銷」。結論：錯誤。
D.en: Incorrect. Service (AWS KMS) key without key material. Import the customer key material into the KMS key. Enable automatic key rotation. Analysis: This option requires the user to manually encrypt the data and import the customer key material into the KMS before migrating the data. The operation is complicated and does not meet the "minimum operation overhead" required by the question. Conclusion: Wrong.

answer_text.zh: A. 將資料移至 S3 儲存桶。使用 Amazon S3 託管加密金鑰 (SSE-S3) 的伺服器端加密。使用 SSE-S3 加密金鑰的內建金鑰輪換行為。
answer_text.en: A. Move the data to the S3 bucket. Use server-side encryption with Amazon S3 managed encryption keys (SSE-S3). Use the built-in key rotation behavior of SSE-S3 encryption keys.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (50%)； B (50%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：SSE-S3 加密金鑰的內建金鑰輪換行為。分析：SSE-S3 是 Amazon S3 的內建加密選項，它使用由 Amazon S3 管理的加密金鑰。 SSE-S3 自動管理金鑰建立和輪換，無需使用者乾預。此選項完全滿足題目要求，且運行開銷最低。結論：。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (50%); B (50%). Popular discussion and key point summary: the built-in key rotation behavior of SSE-S3 encryption keys. Analysis: SSE-S3 is a built-in encryption option for Amazon S3 that uses encryption keys managed by Amazon S3. SSE-S3 automatically manages key creation and rotation without user intervention. This option fully meets the question requirements and has the lowest operating overhead. Conclusion:.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家金融公司的客戶透過發送簡訊請求與財務顧問預約。在 Amazon EC2 執行個體上執行的 Web 應用程式接受預約請求。文字訊息透過 Web 應用程式發佈到 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) 佇列。然後，在 EC2 執行個體上執行的另一個應用程式會向客戶發送會議邀請和會議確認電子郵件。成功安排後，該應用程式會將會議資訊儲存在 Amazon DynamoDB 資料庫中。隨著公司的擴張，客戶報告說他們的會議邀請需要更長的時間才能送達。解決方案架構師應該建議什麼來解決這個問題？
question_text.en: The customers of a finance company request appointments with financial advisors by sending text messages. A web application that runs on Amazon EC2 instances accepts the appointment requests. The text messages are published to an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue through the web application. Another application that runs on EC2 instances then sends meeting invitations and meeting confirmation email messages to the customers. After successful scheduling, this application stores the meeting information in an Amazon DynamoDB database. As the company expands, customers report that their meeting invitations are taking longer to arrive. What should a solutions architect recommend to resolve this issue?

A.zh: 在 DynamoDB 資料庫前面新增 DynamoDB Accelerator (DAX) 叢集。
A.en: Add a DynamoDB Accelerator (DAX) cluster in front of the DynamoDB database.

B.zh: 在接受預約請求的 Web 應用程式前面新增 Amazon API Gateway API。
B.en: Add an Amazon API Gateway API in front of the web application that accepts the appointment requests.

C.zh: 新增 Amazon CloudFront 分配。將來源設定為接受預約請求的 Web 應用程式。
C.en: Add an Amazon CloudFront distribution. Set the origin as the web application that accepts the appointment requests.

D.zh: 為傳送會議邀請的應用程式新增 Auto Scaling 群組。配置 Auto Scaling 組以根據 SQS 佇列的深度進行擴充。
D.en: Add an Auto Scaling group for the application that sends meeting invitations. Configure the Auto Scaling group to scale based on the depth of the SQS queue.

A.zh: 錯誤。DAX主要用於加速DynamoDB的讀取操作，問題中陳述的問題是會議邀請發送較晚，這與DynamoDB的效能無關。
A.en: Incorrect. DAX is mainly used to speed up the read operation of DynamoDB, and the problem stated in the question is that the meeting invitation is sent late, which has nothing to do with the performance of DynamoDB.

B.zh: 錯誤。API閘道可以最佳化請求的管理，但問題的核心是發送會議邀請的延遲，而不是預訂請求的處理速度。
B.en: Incorrect. API Gateway can optimize the management of requests, but the core of the problem is the delay in sending meeting invitations, not the processing speed of reservation requests.

C.zh: 錯誤。CloudFront主要用於內部分發和快取資源，與發送會議邀請無關。
C.en: Incorrect. CloudFront is mainly used for internal distribution and cache resources, and has nothing to do with sending meeting invitations.

D.zh: 正確。透過監控 SQS 佇列的流量，Auto Scaling 群組可以動態擴展處理會議邀請的 EC2 執行個體數量，從而減少延遲。
D.en: Correct. By monitoring the traffic of the SQS queue, the Auto Scaling group can dynamically scale the number of EC2 instances that handle meeting invitations, thereby reducing latency.

answer_text.zh: D. 為傳送會議邀請的應用程式新增 Auto Scaling 群組。配置 Auto Scaling 組以根據 SQS 佇列的深度進行擴充。
answer_text.en: D. Add an Auto Scaling group for the application that sends meeting invitations. Configure the Auto Scaling group to scale based on the depth of the SQS queue.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：透過監控 SQS 佇列的流量，Auto Scaling 群組可以動態擴展處理會議邀請的 EC2 執行個體數量，從而減少延遲。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: By monitoring the traffic of the SQS queue, the Auto Scaling group can dynamically scale the number of EC2 instances that handle meeting invitations, thereby reducing latency.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家線上零售公司擁有超過 5,000 萬活躍客戶，每天收到超過 25,000 個訂單。該公司收集客戶的購買資料並將這些資料儲存在 Amazon S3 中。其他客戶資料儲存在 Amazon RDS 中。該公司希望將所有數據提供給各個團隊，以便團隊可以進行分析。此解決方案必須提供管理細粒度資料權限的能力，並且必須最大限度地減少營運開銷。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: An online retail company has more than 50 million active customers and receives more than 25,000 orders each day. The company collects purchase data for customers and stores this data in Amazon S3. Additional customer data is stored in Amazon RDS. The company wants to make all the data available to various teams so that the teams can perform analytics. The solution must provide the ability to manage fine-grained permissions for the data and must minimize operational overhead. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 遷移購買資料以直接寫入 Amazon RDS。使用 RDS 存取控制來限制存取。
A.en: Migrate the purchase data to write directly to Amazon RDS. Use RDS access controls to limit access.

B.zh: 安排 AWS Lambda 函數定期將資料從 Amazon RDS 複製到 Amazon S3。建立 AWS Glue 爬網程式。使用 Amazon Athena 查詢資料。使用 S3 策略來限制存取。
B.en: Schedule an AWS Lambda function to periodically copy data from Amazon RDS to Amazon S3. Create an AWS Glue crawler. Use Amazon Athena to query the data. Use S3 policies to limit access.

C.zh: 使用 AWS Lake Formation 建立資料湖。建立與 Amazon RDS 的 AWS Glue JDBC 連線。在 Lake Formation 中註冊 S3 儲存桶。使用 Lake Formation 存取控制來限制存取。
C.en: Create a data lake by using AWS Lake Formation. Create an AWS Glue JDBC connection to Amazon RDS. Register the S3 bucket in Lake Formation. Use Lake Formation access controls to limit access.

D.zh: 建立 Amazon Redshift 叢集。安排 AWS Lambda 函數會定期將資料從 Amazon S3 和 Amazon RDS 複製到 Amazon Redshift。使用 Amazon Redshift 存取控制來限制存取。
D.en: Create an Amazon Redshift cluster. Schedule an AWS Lambda function to periodically copy data from Amazon S3 and Amazon RDS to Amazon Redshift. Use Amazon Redshift access controls to limit access.

A.zh: 錯誤。原因：將所有資料遷移到Amazon RDS會導致儲存成本增加，且RDS不適合儲存大量非結構化資料（例如S3中的資料）。另外，RDS的權限管理不夠靈活，無法滿足細緻的權限需求。
A.en: Incorrect. Reason for the Migrating all data to Amazon RDS will result in increased storage costs, and RDS is not suitable for storing large amounts of unstructured data (such as data in S3). In addition, RDS's permission management is not flexible enough to meet fine-grained permission requirements.

B.zh: 錯誤。原因：此方案雖然可以實現資料分析，但S3策略的權限管理不夠細粒度，無法滿足問題的要求。此外，定期複製資料會增加操作複雜性。
B.en: Incorrect. reason: Although this solution can achieve data analysis, the permission management of S3 policies is not fine-grained enough to meet the requirements of the question. Additionally, regularly replicating data increases operational complexity.

C.zh: 正確。原因：Lake Formation是專門為建置資料湖而設計的服務，支援細粒度的權限管理。 RDS資料可以透過AWS Glue JDBC連線整合；透過註冊S3桶，可以整合S3資料。此方案滿足了問題對於權限管理和簡化操作的要求。
C.en: Correct. reason: Lake Formation is a service specially designed for building data lakes and supports fine-grained permission management. RDS data can be integrated through AWS Glue JDBC connection; S3 data can be integrated by registering an S3 bucket. This solution meets the requirements of the question for permission management and simplified operations.

D.zh: 錯誤。原因：雖然Redshift適合資料分析，但定期複製資料會增加操作複雜度。另外，Redshift的權限管理不如Lake Formation靈活，無法滿足細粒度的權限需求。
D.en: Incorrect. reason: Although Redshift is suitable for data analysis, regular copying of data increases operational complexity. In addition, Redshift's permission management is not as flexible as Lake Formation and cannot meet fine-grained permission requirements.

answer_text.zh: C. 使用 AWS Lake Formation 建立資料湖。建立與 Amazon RDS 的 AWS Glue JDBC 連線。在 Lake Formation 中註冊 S3 儲存桶。使用 Lake Formation 存取控制來限制存取。
answer_text.en: C. Create a data lake by using AWS Lake Formation. Create an AWS Glue JDBC connection to Amazon RDS. Register the S3 bucket in Lake Formation. Use Lake Formation access controls to limit access.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：原因：Lake Formation是專門為建置資料湖而設計的服務，支援細粒度的權限管理。 RDS資料可以透過AWS Glue JDBC連線整合；透過註冊S3桶，可以整合S3資料。此方案滿足了問題對於權限管理和簡化操作的要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: reason: Lake Formation is a service specially designed for building data lakes and supports fine-grained permission management. RDS data can be integrated through AWS Glue JDBC connection; S3 data can be integrated by registering an S3 bucket. This solution meets the requirements of the question for permission management and simplified operations.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在本地資料中心託管行銷網站。該網站由靜態文件組成，並在單一伺服器上運行。管理員很少更新網站內容，並使用SFTP客戶端上傳新文件。該公司決定在 AWS 上託管其網站並使用 Amazon CloudFront。該公司的解決方案架構師創建了一個 CloudFront 發行版。解決方案架構師必須為網站託管設計最具成本效益和彈性的架構，以充當 CloudFront 來源。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company hosts a marketing website in an on-premises data center. The website consists of static documents and runs on a single server. An administrator updates the website content infrequently and uses an SFTP client to upload new documents. The company decides to host its website on AWS and to use Amazon CloudFront. The company’s solutions architect creates a CloudFront distribution. The solutions architect must design the most cost-effective and resilient architecture for website hosting to serve as the CloudFront origin. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 使用 Amazon Lightsail 建立虛擬伺服器。在 Lightsail 實例中設定 Web 伺服器。使用SFTP客戶端上傳網站內容。
A.en: Create a virtual server by using Amazon Lightsail. Configure the web server in the Lightsail instance. Upload website content by using an SFTP client.

B.zh: 為 Amazon EC2 執行個體建立 AWS Auto Scaling 群組。使用應用程式負載平衡器。使用SFTP客戶端上傳網站內容。
B.en: Create an AWS Auto Scaling group for Amazon EC2 instances. Use an Application Load Balancer. Upload website content by using an SFTP client.

C.zh: 建立私有 Amazon S3 儲存桶。使用 S3 儲存桶策略允許從 CloudFront 來源存取身分識別 (OAI) 進行存取。使用 AWS CLI 上傳網站內容。
C.en: Create a private Amazon S3 bucket. Use an S3 bucket policy to allow access from a CloudFront origin access identity (OAI). Upload website content by using the AWS CLI.

D.zh: 建立公用 Amazon S3 儲存桶。配置 AWS Transfer for SFTP。配置用於網站託管的 S3 儲存桶。使用SFTP客戶端上傳網站內容。
D.en: Create a public Amazon S3 bucket. Configure AWS Transfer for SFTP. Configure the S3 bucket for website hosting. Upload website content by using the SFTP client.

A.zh: 錯誤。本質分析：Lightsail 可用於託管網站，但需要運行虛擬伺服器並配置 Web 伺服器，這增加了管理複雜性和成本。提出問題的原因需要最具成本效益和最靈活的架構，而 Lightsail 需要連續運行實例，成本更高，而且不像 S3 的靜態託管那麼簡單。
A.en: Incorrect. ness analysis: Lightsail can be used to host websites, but it requires running a virtual server and configuring the web server, which increases management complexity and cost. Reason for the The question requires the most cost-effective and flexible architecture, and Lightsail requires continuous running instances, which is more expensive and not as simple as S3's static hosting.

B.zh: 錯誤。本質分析：EC2 Auto Scaling 群組和 ALB 可以提供高可用性，但這是專為動態內容設計的架構。問題原因明確指出網站是靜態內容，使用EC2和ALB會導致不必要的複雜性和高昂的成本。
B.en: Incorrect. ness analysis: EC2 Auto Scaling groups and ALB can provide high availability, but this is an architecture designed for dynamic content. Reason for the The question clearly states that the website is static content, and using EC2 and ALB will lead to unnecessary complexity and high costs.

C.zh: 正確。本質分析：S3是託管靜態網站的最佳選擇，與CloudFront結合可以提供高效能和全球分佈。使用 OAI 確保安全。正確理由：這是最經濟、最靈活的解決方案，完全滿足問題的要求。
C.en: Correct. ness analysis: S3 is the best choice for hosting static websites, and combined with CloudFront can provide high performance and global distribution. Security is ensured using OAI. Correct reason: This is the most cost-effective and flexible solution and fully meets the requirements of the question.

D.zh: 錯誤。本質分析：S3可以託管靜態網站，但將bucket設定為公共存取會帶來安全風險。問題的原因需要安全性，而公共儲存桶不符合最佳實踐。此外，AWS Transfer for SFTP 會增加額外成本。
D.en: Incorrect. ness analysis: S3 can host static websites, but setting the bucket to public access will bring security risks. Reason for the The question requires security, and public storage buckets do not comply with best practices. Additionally, AWS Transfer for SFTP adds additional costs.

answer_text.zh: C. 建立私有 Amazon S3 儲存桶。使用 S3 儲存桶策略允許從 CloudFront 來源存取身分識別 (OAI) 進行存取。使用 AWS CLI 上傳網站內容。
answer_text.en: C. Create a private Amazon S3 bucket. Use an S3 bucket policy to allow access from a CloudFront origin access identity (OAI). Upload website content by using the AWS CLI.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (82%)； D (18%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：本質分析：S3是託管靜態網站的最佳選擇，與CloudFront結合可以提供高效能和全球分佈。使用 OAI 確保安全。正確理由：這是最經濟、最靈活的解決方案，完全滿足問題的要求。

Popular discussion and key point summary: ness analysis: S3 is the best choice for hosting static websites, and combined with CloudFront can provide high performance and global distribution. Security is ensured using OAI. Correct reason: This is the most cost-effective and flexible solution and fully meets the requirements of the question.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司想要管理 Amazon 系統映像 (AMI)。該公司目前將 AMI 複製到建立 AMI 的相同 AWS 區域。該公司需要設計一個應用程式來捕獲 AWS API 調用，並在公司帳戶內調用 Amazon EC2 CreateImage API 操作時發送警報。哪種解決方案能夠以最少的營運開銷滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to manage Amazon Machine Images (AMIs). The company currently copies AMIs to the same AWS Region where the AMIs were created. The company needs to design an application that captures AWS API calls and sends alerts whenever the Amazon EC2 CreateImage API operation is called within the company’s account. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

A.zh: 建立 AWS Lambda 函數以查詢 AWS CloudTrail 日誌並在偵測到 CreateImage API 呼叫時傳送警報。
A.en: Create an AWS Lambda function to query AWS CloudTrail logs and to send an alert when a CreateImage API call is detected.

B.zh: 使用 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 通知配置 AWS CloudTrail，該通知會在更新的日誌傳送至 Amazon S3 時發生。使用 Amazon Athena 建立新資料表並在偵測到 API 呼叫時對 CreateImage 進行查詢。
B.en: Configure AWS CloudTrail with an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) notification that occurs when updated logs are sent to Amazon S3. Use Amazon Athena to create a new table and to query on CreateImage when an API call is detected.

C.zh: 為 CreateImage API 呼叫建立 Amazon EventBridge (Amazon CloudWatch Events) 規則。將目標配置為 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主題，以便在偵測到 CreateImage API 呼叫時發送警報。
C.en: Create an Amazon EventBridge (Amazon CloudWatch Events) rule for the CreateImage API call. Configure the target as an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic to send an alert when a CreateImage API call is detected.

D.zh: 將 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) FIFO 佇列配置為 AWS CloudTrail 日誌的目標。建立一個 AWS Lambda 函數，以便在偵測到 CreateImage API 呼叫時向 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主題發送警報。
D.en: Configure an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) FIFO queue as a target for AWS CloudTrail logs. Create an AWS Lambda function to send an alert to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic when a CreateImage API call is detected.

A.zh: 錯誤。雖然可以透過 Lambda 查詢 CloudTrail 日誌來偵測 API 調用，但這種方法需要定期執行 Lambda 函數來掃描日誌，從而增加了操作開銷。另外，這種方法不是即時的，可能會有延遲。
A.en: Incorrect. While it is possible to query CloudTrail logs via Lambda to detect API calls, this approach requires running a Lambda function periodically to scan the logs, adding operational overhead. In addition, this method is not real-time and there may be delays.

B.zh: 錯誤。此方法依賴CloudTrail將日誌儲存到S3，然後使用Athena查詢日誌。此方法需要手動配置Athena表，查詢過程可能會有延遲。營運費用較高，不符合「最低營運費用」要求。
B.en: Incorrect. This method relies on CloudTrail to store the logs to S3 and then use Athena to query the logs. This method requires manual configuration of the Athena table, and the query process may be delayed. The operating overhead is high and does not meet the "minimum operating overhead" requirement.

C.zh: 正確。EventBridge 可以直接擷取 CreateImage API 呼叫事件並將其傳送至 SNS 主題以觸發警報。這種方法是即時的並且具有最小的操作開銷，因為不需要額外的日誌查詢或儲存配置。
C.en: Correct. EventBridge can capture CreateImage API call events directly and send them to an SNS topic to trigger an alert. This approach is real-time and has minimal operational overhead since no additional log queries or storage configuration are required.

D.zh: 錯誤。此方法需要配置SQS佇列和Lambda函數，增加了操作複雜度。另外，依賴CloudTrail日誌可能會造成延遲，而且不如EventBridge即時。
D.en: Incorrect. This method requires configuring an SQS queue and Lambda function, increasing operational complexity. In addition, relying on CloudTrail logs may cause delays and is not as real-time as EventBridge.

answer_text.zh: C. 為 CreateImage API 呼叫建立 Amazon EventBridge (Amazon CloudWatch Events) 規則。將目標配置為 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主題，以便在偵測到 CreateImage API 呼叫時發送警報。
answer_text.en: C. Create an Amazon EventBridge (Amazon CloudWatch Events) rule for the CreateImage API call. Configure the target as an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic to send an alert when a CreateImage API call is detected.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (77%)； A (15%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：EventBridge 可以直接擷取 CreateImage API 呼叫事件並將其傳送至 SNS 主題以觸發警報。這種方法是即時的並且具有最小的操作開銷，因為不需要額外的日誌查詢或儲存配置。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (77%); A (15%). Popular discussion and key point summary: EventBridge can capture CreateImage API call events directly and send them to an SNS topic to trigger an alert. This approach is real-time and has minimal operational overhead since no additional log queries or storage configuration are required.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司擁有一個非同步 API，用於接收使用者請求，並根據請求類型將請求分派到適當的微服務進行處理。該公司正在使用 Amazon API Gateway 部署 API 前端，並使用 AWS Lambda 函數呼叫 Amazon DynamoDB 來儲存使用者請求，然後再將其分派到處理微服務。該公司在預算允許的範圍內配置了盡可能多的 DynamoDB 吞吐量，但該公司仍然遇到可用性問題並且正在丟失用戶請求。解決方案架構師應該如何解決這個問題而不影響現有使用者？
question_text.en: A company owns an asynchronous API that is used to ingest user requests and, based on the request type, dispatch requests to the appropriate microservice for processing. The company is using Amazon API Gateway to deploy the API front end, and an AWS Lambda function that invokes Amazon DynamoDB to store user requests before dispatching them to the processing microservices. The company provisioned as much DynamoDB throughput as its budget allows, but the company is still experiencing availability issues and is losing user requests. What should a solutions architect do to address this issue without impacting existing users?

A.zh: 透過伺服器端限制在 API 閘道上新增限制。
A.en: Add throttling on the API Gateway with server-side throttling limits.

B.zh: 使用 DynamoDB Accelerator (DAX) 和 Lambda 緩衝對 DynamoDB 的寫入。
B.en: Use DynamoDB Accelerator (DAX) and Lambda to buffer writes to DynamoDB.

C.zh: 在 DynamoDB 中為包含使用者要求的表格建立二級索引。
C.en: Create a secondary index in DynamoDB for the table with the user requests.

D.zh: 使用 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) 佇列和 Lambda 緩衝對 DynamoDB 的寫入。
D.en: Use the Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue and Lambda to buffer writes to DynamoDB.

A.zh: 錯誤。分析：API閘道的限流雖然可以減少請求數量，但會直接影響使用者體驗，導致使用者請求被拒絕或延遲。
A.en: Incorrect. Analysis: Although the throttling limit of API Gateway can reduce the number of requests, it will directly affect the user experience, causing user requests to be rejected or delayed.

B.zh: 錯誤。分析：DAX主要用於加速讀取操作，而非寫入操作。問題中指出的問題是寫入吞吐量不足。因為DAX是用來解決無條紋問題的，所以選項是錯的。
B.en: Incorrect. Analysis: DAX is mainly used to speed up read operations, not write operations. The problem stated in the question is insufficient write throughput. Because DAX is used to solve the problem without stripes, the options are wrong.

C.zh: 錯誤。分析：二級索引用於最佳化查詢效能，與寫入吞吐量無關。建立二級索引並不能緩解寫入壓力，因為。
C.en: Incorrect. Analysis: Secondary indexes are used to optimize query performance and have nothing to do with write throughput. Creating a secondary index will not relieve the writing pressure because of the.

D.zh: 正確。分析：使用Amazon SQS作為緩衝佇列可以有效分散寫入壓力，將使用者請求暫時儲存在佇列中，然後透過Lambda函數逐步寫入DynamoDB。 對 S3 儲存桶的
D.en: Correct. Analysis: Using Amazon SQS as a buffer queue can effectively disperse the writing pressure, temporarily store user requests in the queue, and then gradually write them to DynamoDB through the Lambda function.

answer_text.zh: D. 使用 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) 佇列和 Lambda 緩衝對 DynamoDB 的寫入。
answer_text.en: D. Use the Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue and Lambda to buffer writes to DynamoDB.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (99%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：分析：使用Amazon SQS作為緩衝佇列可以有效分散寫入壓力，將使用者請求暫時儲存在佇列中，然後透過Lambda函數逐步寫入DynamoDB。 對 S3 儲存桶的
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (99%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Analysis: Using Amazon SQS as a buffer queue can effectively disperse the writing pressure, temporarily store user requests in the queue, and then gradually write them to DynamoDB through the Lambda function.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司需要將資料從 Amazon EC2 執行個體移至 Amazon S3 儲存桶。公司必須確保沒有 API 呼叫和資料透過公共網際網路路由進行路由。只有 EC2 執行個體有權將資料上傳到 S3 儲存桶。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company needs to move data from an Amazon EC2 instance to an Amazon S3 bucket. The company must ensure that no API calls and no data are routed through public internet routes. Only the EC2 instance can have access to upload data to the S3 bucket. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 在 EC2 執行個體所在的子網路中為 Amazon S3 建立介面 VPC 終端節點。將資源策略附加到 S3 儲存桶，以僅允許 EC2 執行個體的 IAM 角色進行存取。
A.en: Create an interface VPC endpoint for Amazon S3 in the subnet where the EC2 instance is located. Attach a resource policy to the S3 bucket to only allow the EC2 instance’s IAM role for access.

B.zh: 在 EC2 執行個體所在的可用區中為 Amazon S3 建立網關 VPC 終端節點。將適當的安全群組附加到端點。將資源策略附加到 S3 儲存桶，以僅允許 EC2 執行個體的 IAM 角色進行存取。
B.en: Create a gateway VPC endpoint for Amazon S3 in the Availability Zone where the EC2 instance is located. Attach appropriate security groups to the endpoint. Attach a resource policy to the S3 bucket to only allow the EC2 instance’s IAM role for access.

C.zh: 從 EC2 執行個體內部執行 nslookup 工具以取得 S3 儲存桶的服務 API 端點的私人 IP 位址。在 VPC 路由表中建立路​​由，為 EC2 執行個體提供對 S3 儲存桶的存取權限。將資源策略附加到 S3 儲存桶，以僅允許 EC2 執行個體的 IAM 角色進行存取。
C.en: Run the nslookup tool from inside the EC2 instance to obtain the private IP address of the S3 bucket’s service API endpoint. Create a route in the VPC route table to provide the EC2 instance with access to the S3 bucket. Attach a resource policy to the S3 bucket to only allow the EC2 instance’s IAM role for access.

D.zh: 使用 AWS 提供的公開可用的 ip-ranges.json 檔案取得 S3 儲存桶的服務 API 端點的私人 IP 位址。在 VPC 路由表中建立路​​由，為 EC2 執行個體提供對 S3 儲存桶的存取權限。將資源策略附加到 S3 儲存桶，以僅允許 EC2 執行個體的 IAM 角色進行存取。
D.en: Use the AWS provided, publicly available ip-ranges.json file to obtain the private IP address of the S3 bucket’s service API endpoint. Create a route in the VPC route table to provide the EC2 instance with access to the S3 bucket. Attach a resource policy to the S3 bucket to only allow the EC2 instance’s IAM role for access.

A.zh: 正確。策略僅允許 EC2 執行個體的 IAM 角色進行存取。分析：介面 VPC 終端節點允許透過專用網路存取 Amazon S3，而無需透過公共網際網路。資源策略可以將對 S3 儲存桶的存取權限限制為僅特定 IAM 角色（EC2 執行個體的 IAM 角色）。此選項完全滿足問題的要求：避免公共網路存取並限制存取權限。
A.en: Correct. policy to the S3 bucket to only allow the EC2 instance’s IAM role for access. Analysis: The Interface VPC Endpoint allows access to Amazon S3 over a private network without going through the public internet. Resource policies can restrict access to S3 buckets to only specific IAM roles (IAM roles for EC2 instances). This option fully meets the requirements of the question: avoid public Internet access and limit access rights.

B.zh: 錯誤。將適當的安全群組加入端點。將資源策略附加到 S3 儲存桶，以僅允許 EC2 執行個體的 IAM 角色進行存取。分析：網關 VPC 終端節點可與 Amazon S3 和 DynamoDB 搭配使用，但它是基於路由表而不是基於子網路的介面終端節點。問題要求「在子網路中建立終端節點」，而不是在可用區中建立終端節點，因此該選項不能完全滿足問題要求。此外，安全群組無法直接附加到網關 VPC 終端節點。
B.en: Incorrect. appropriate security groups to the endpoint. Attach a resource policy to the S3 bucket to only allow the EC2 instance’s IAM role for access. Analysis: Gateway VPC Endpoint works with Amazon S3 and DynamoDB, but it is based on route tables rather than subnet-based interface endpoints. The question requires "Create an endpoint in a subnet" instead of creating an endpoint in an Availability Zone, so this option does not fully meet the question requirements. Additionally, security groups cannot be attached directly to Gateway VPC Endpoint.

C.zh: 錯誤。端點。在 VPC 路由表中建立路​​由，為 EC2 執行個體提供對 S3 儲存桶的存取權限。將資源策略附加到 S3 儲存桶，以僅允許 EC2 執行個體的 IAM 角色進行存取。分析：使用nslookup工具取得S3的私有IP位址並手動建立路由表條目是不可行的，因為S3服務端點是動態的，不能依賴這種方式。來實現存取。這種方法很複雜且不符合 AWS 最佳實務。
C.en: Incorrect. endpoint. Create a route in the VPC route table to provide the EC2 instance with access to the S3 bucket. Attach a resource policy to the S3 bucket to only allow the EC2 instance’s IAM role for access. Analysis: Using the nslookup tool to obtain S3’s private IP address and manually create the route table entry is not feasible because the S3 service endpoint is dynamic and cannot be relied upon this way. to achieve access. This approach is complex and inconsistent with AWS best practices.

D.zh: 錯誤。API 端點。在 VPC 路由表中建立路​​由，為 EC2 執行個體提供對 S3 儲存桶的存取權限。將資源策略附加到 S3 儲存桶，以僅允許 EC2 執行個體的 IAM 角色進行存取。分析：ip-ranges.json檔案提供了AWS服務的公共IP位址範圍，而不是私有IP位址。此方法無法實現透過私網存取S3服務。該選項不符合題目要求。
D.en: Incorrect. API endpoint. Create a route in the VPC route table to provide the EC2 instance with access to the S3 bucket. Attach a resource policy to the S3 bucket to only allow the EC2 instance’s IAM role for access. Analysis: The ip-ranges.json file provides the public IP address range of the AWS service, not the private IP address. This method cannot achieve access to S3 services through private networks. This option does not meet the question requirements.

answer_text.zh: A. 在 EC2 執行個體所在的子網路中為 Amazon S3 建立介面 VPC 終端節點。將資源策略附加到 S3 儲存桶，以僅允許 EC2 執行個體的 IAM 角色進行存取。
answer_text.en: A. Create an interface VPC endpoint for Amazon S3 in the subnet where the EC2 instance is located. Attach a resource policy to the S3 bucket to only allow the EC2 instance’s IAM role for access.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (56%)； B (44%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：策略僅允許 EC2 執行個體的 IAM 角色進行存取。分析：介面 VPC 終端節點允許透過專用網路存取 Amazon S3，而無需透過公共網際網路。資源策略可以將對 S3 儲存桶的存取權限限制為僅特定 IAM 角色（EC2 執行個體的 IAM 角色）。此選項完全滿足問題的要求：避免公共網路存取並限制存取權限。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (56%); B (44%). Popular discussion and key point summary: policy to the S3 bucket to only allow the EC2 instance’s IAM role for access. Analysis: The Interface VPC Endpoint allows access to Amazon S3 over a private network without going through the public internet. Resource policies can restrict access to S3 buckets to only specific IAM roles (IAM roles for EC2 instances). This option fully meets the requirements of the question: avoid public Internet access and limit access rights.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: A solutions architect is designing the architecture of a new application being deployed to the AWS Cloud. The application will run on Amazon EC2 On-Demand Instances and will automatically scale a downcple scale a [quulity seal alt. throughout the day. An Application Load Balancer (ALB) will handle the load distribution. The architecture needs to support distributed session data management. The company is willing to make changes to code if needed。 distributed session data management?
question_text.en: A solutions architect is designing the architecture of a new application being deployed to the AWS Cloud. The application will run on Amazon EC2 On-Demand Instances and will automatically scale across multiple Availability Zones. The EC2 instances will scale up and down frequently throughout the day. An Application Load Balancer (ALB) will handle the load distribution. The architecture needs to support distributed session data management. The company is willing to make changes to code if needed. What should the solutions architect do to ensure that the architecture supports distributed session data management?

A.zh: 使用 Amazon ElastiCache 管理和儲存會話資料。
A.en: Use Amazon ElastiCache to manage and store session data.

B.zh: 使用 ALB 的會話親和性（黏性會話）來管理會話資料。
B.en: Use session affinity (sticky sessions) of the ALB to manage session data.

C.zh: 使用 AWS Systems Manager 中的會話管理器來管理會話。
C.en: Use Session Manager from AWS Systems Manager to manage the session.

D.zh: 使用 AWS Security Token Service (AWS STS) 中的 GetSessionToken API 作業來管理會話。
D.en: Use the GetSessionToken API operation in AWS Security Token Service (AWS STS) to manage the session.

A.zh: 正確。Amazon ElastiCache 是一種高效能、低延遲的分散式快取服務，適合儲存會話資料並支援分散式架構。它支援上下遊EC2實例，並且可以透過Redis或Memcached共享會話資料。
A.en: Correct. Amazon ElastiCache is a high-performance, low-latency distributed cache service suitable for storing session data and supporting distributed architectures. It supports upstream and downstream EC2 instances, and can share session data through Redis or Memcached.

B.zh: 錯誤。Sticky Sessions 會將使用者請求導向至特定的 EC2 實例，但這不是 Hatamasa 的分散式會話管理解決方案。當 EC2 執行個體頻繁啟動和關閉時，黏性會話可能會導致會話遺失或不一致。
B.en: Incorrect. Sticky Sessions will target user requests to specific EC2 instances, but this is not Hatamasa's distributed session management solution. Sticky Sessions can cause session loss or inconsistency when EC2 instances are frequently brought up and down.

C.zh: 錯誤。Session Manager 是一個用於管理 EC2 執行個體的遠端會話工具，與應用程式會話資料管理無關。
C.en: Incorrect. Session Manager is a remote session tool used to manage EC2 instances and has nothing to do with application session data management.

D.zh: 錯誤。GetSessionToken API 用於產生臨時安全性憑證，與應用程式的會話資料管理無關。
D.en: Incorrect. The GetSessionToken API is used to generate temporary security credentials and has nothing to do with the application's session data management.

answer_text.zh: A. 使用 Amazon ElastiCache 管理和儲存會話資料。
answer_text.en: A. Use Amazon ElastiCache to manage and store session data.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：Amazon ElastiCache 是一種高效能、低延遲的分散式快取服務，適合儲存會話資料並支援分散式架構。它支援上下遊EC2實例，並且可以透過Redis或Memcached共享會話資料。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon ElastiCache is a high-performance, low-latency distributed cache service suitable for storing session data and supporting distributed architectures. It supports upstream and downstream EC2 instances, and can share session data through Redis or Memcached.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: A company offers a food delivery service that is growing rapidly. Because of the growth, the company’s order processing system is experiencing scaling problems during peak traffsing system is experiencing scaling problems during peak traffic hours.實例，用於從應用程式收集訂單 • 在 Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling 群組中運行的另一組 EC2 實例，用於履行訂單 訂單收集過程發生得很快，但訂單履行過程可能需要更長的時間。 Data must not be lost because of a scaling event.解決方案架構師必須確保訂單收集流程和訂單履行流程都能在高峰流量時段適當擴展。 The solution must optimize utilization of the company’s AWS resources.哪一種解決方案符合這些要求？
question_text.en: A company offers a food delivery service that is growing rapidly. Because of the growth, the company’s order processing system is experiencing scaling problems during peak traffic hours. The current architecture includes the following: • A group of Amazon EC2 instances that run in an Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling group to collect orders from the application • Another group of EC2 instances that run in an Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling group to fulfill orders The order collection process occurs quickly, but the order fulfillment process can take longer. Data must not be lost because of a scaling event. A solutions architect must ensure that the order collection process and the order fulfillment process can both scale properly during peak traffic hours. The solution must optimize utilization of the company’s AWS resources. Which solution meets these requirements?

A.zh: 使用 Amazon CloudWatch 指標監控 Auto Scaling 群組中每個執行個體的 CPU。根據峰值工作負載值配置每個 Auto Scaling 群組的最小容量。
A.en: Use Amazon CloudWatch metrics to monitor the CPU of each instance in the Auto Scaling groups. Configure each Auto Scaling group’s minimum capacity according to peak workload values.

B.zh: 使用 Amazon CloudWatch 指標監控 Auto Scaling 群組中每個執行個體的 CPU。配置 CloudWatch 警報以呼叫 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主題，該主題根據需要建立其他 Auto Scaling 群組。
B.en: Use Amazon CloudWatch metrics to monitor the CPU of each instance in the Auto Scaling groups. Configure a CloudWatch alarm to invoke an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic that creates additional Auto Scaling groups on demand.

C.zh: 設定兩個 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) 佇列：一個用於訂單收集，另一個用於訂單履行。配置 EC2 執行個體以輪詢其各自的隊列。根據佇列發送的通知擴充 Auto Scaling 群組。
C.en: Provision two Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queues: one for order collection and another for order fulfillment. Configure the EC2 instances to poll their respective queue. Scale the Auto Scaling groups based on notifications that the queues send.

D.zh: 設定兩個 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) 佇列：一個用於訂單收集，另一個用於訂單履行。配置 EC2 執行個體以輪詢其各自的隊列。根據每個實例的積壓計算建立一個指標。根據此指標擴展 Auto Scaling 組。
D.en: Provision two Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queues: one for order collection and another for order fulfillment. Configure the EC2 instances to poll their respective queue. Create a metric based on a backlog per instance calculation. Scale the Auto Scaling groups based on this metric.

A.zh: 錯誤。無條帶最佳化資源利用，因為它沒有考慮訂單處理的動態需求。
A.en: Incorrect. Stripless optimization of resource utilization because it does not take into account the dynamic needs of order processing.

B.zh: 錯誤。建立額外的 Auto Scaling 群組並不是解決訂單瓶頸問題的最佳方法。
B.en: Incorrect. Creating additional Auto Scaling groups is not the best way to solve the order bottleneck problem.

C.zh: 錯誤。一個用於訂單收集，另一個用於訂單履行。配置 EC2 執行個體以輪詢其各自的隊列。根據佇列發送的通知擴充 Auto Scaling 群組。部分正確：使用SQS佇列可以有效分離訂單收集和訂單完成的流程。僅根據佇列發送的通知擴展 Auto Scaling 群組可能無法正確處理壓力問題。
C.en: Incorrect. One for order collection and the other for order fulfillment. Configure EC2 instances to poll their respective queues. Scale the Auto Scaling group based on notifications sent by the queue. Partially true: Using SQS queues can effectively separate the flow of order collection and order completion. Expanding the Auto Scaling group based only on notifications sent by the queue may not correctly handle the stress issue.

D.zh: 正確。一個用於訂單收集，另一個用於訂單履行。配置 EC2 執行個體以輪詢其各自的隊列。根據每個實例的積壓計算建立一個指標。根據此指標擴展 Auto Scaling 組。 True：可選擇透過 SQS 佇列分離訂單收集和訂單履行流程，並根據壓力表動態擴展 Auto Scaling 群組。優化資源利用率，同時確保訂單不會因規模問題而遺失。
D.en: Correct. One for order collection and the other for order fulfillment. Configure EC2 instances to poll their respective queues. Create a metric based on the backlog calculation for each instance. Scale the Auto Scaling group based on this metric. True: Option to separate order collection and order fulfillment flows through SQS queues and dynamically expand Auto Scaling groups based on pressure gauges. Optimized resource utilization while ensuring orders are not lost due to scaling issues.

answer_text.zh: D. 設定兩個 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) 佇列：一個用於訂單收集，另一個用於訂單履行。配置 EC2 執行個體以輪詢其各自的隊列。根據每個實例的積壓計算建立一個指標。根據此指標擴展 Auto Scaling 組。
answer_text.en: D. Provision two Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queues: one for order collection and another for order fulfillment. Configure the EC2 instances to poll their respective queue. Create a metric based on a backlog per instance calculation. Scale the Auto Scaling groups based on this metric.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (91%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：一個用於訂單收集，另一個用於訂單履行。配置 EC2 執行個體以輪詢其各自的隊列。根據每個實例的積壓計算建立一個指標。根據此指標擴展 Auto Scaling 組。 True：可選擇透過 SQS 佇列分離訂單收集和訂單履行流程，並根據壓力表動態擴展 Auto Scaling 群組。優化資源利用率，同時確保訂單不會因規模問題而遺失。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (91%). Popular discussion and key point summary: One for order collection and the other for order fulfillment. Configure EC2 instances to poll their respective queues. Create a metric based on the backlog calculation for each instance. Scale the Auto Scaling group based on this metric. True: Option to separate order collection and order fulfillment flows through SQS queues and dynamically expand Auto Scaling groups based on pressure gauges. Optimized resource utilization while ensuring orders are not lost due to scaling issues.
